case_title: GOMAXXX INC. VS. HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-13-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF GOMAXXX INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARSTEN HOFFMANN (CEO). DEFENDANT HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE IS PROPER, CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE "LEGALZOOM" LISTED ON SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE WAS SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,982.03 FILED BY GOMAXXX INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMAXXX INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC $4,982.03 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,047.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMAXXX INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HANLEY HOLDINGS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARSTEN HOFFMANN, CEO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMAXXX INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.
